e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML now names protocol(...) and capability(...) as explicit grammar hooks and source rows. Protocol rows can witness whether a capability row fits their surface, channel, declared capability, and ready status; the shared channel/protocol/choice floor includes this source-level compatibility proof.
public_endpoints: not-public-endpoint: BML source grammar proof surface
test_flows: BML grammar -> protocol/capability rule lookup -> grammar hooks exist as data
protocol(...) source expression -> bml-source-protocol-row -> accessors preserve surface/channel/capability/cost
capability(...) source expression -> bml-source-capability-row -> accessors preserve trust floor and lane
protocol row + capability row -> compatibility witness -> composite floor proof
